title: phaseoloides sutherlandii
intro: Phaseoloides sutherlandii is a plant species native to Australia, commonly known as Sutherland's bean or the Queensland pea, which belongs to the Fabaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Aboriginal medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Phaseoloides sutherlandii include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate gastrointestinal issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
